price_source: DexScreener (chainId=robinhood); windows m5/h1/h6/h24. chg_12h_snap is from local hourly snapshots (fills over time).
note: whales_bought = big wallets that PAID for the token: native value in the tx, a quote-token (WETH/USDG/…) or any other token given up in the same tx (token-to-token swap), or a direct Uniswap-v4 pool transfer. whales_airdropped counts free receipts from contracts AND from EOA mass-distributors (>=10 whale recipients). whales_hold includes airdropped holders.
